title: Project Manager (m/f/d)
required_skills: Degree in Construction Management, Engineering, or related field
Demonstrated experience in project management with focus on Data Centers or large-scale projects
Proven experience delivering complex industrial construction projects (high-tech, data center, semiconductor)
Strong technical understanding of Electrical, Mechanical, and CSA (Civil, Structural, Architectural) components
matched_skills: Project management fundamentals: cross-functional team coordination and milestone tracking at HSBC and Hapag-Lloyd
Communication and presentation skills: executive reporting, stakeholder communications
German B1 (partial — JD requires very good German)
missing_skills: Construction management or engineering degree (candidate has business/management degrees)
Data center or industrial construction project management experience (no construction industry background)
Technical understanding of Electrical, Mechanical, and CSA/structural components
Contractor and subcontractor management in construction context
Very good German (B1 vs. required very good)
core_responsibilities: Lead planning, execution, and delivery of data center construction projects
Own and manage project budgets, timelines, and quality benchmarks
Coordinate and oversee external planning partners, contractors, and suppliers
Prepare and present monthly performance reports
Serve as primary contact for clients, suppliers, and subcontractors
recommended_emphasis: This role is a poor match — application is not recommended
The role requires construction/engineering domain expertise that the candidate entirely lacks
Technical understanding of MEP and CSA components cannot be substituted with programme governance experience
The candidate should focus on pure PMO and programme management roles in service/technology sectors
summary: Match score 18.8% — poor match. This is a construction project management role for data center and high-tech facility projects, requiring engineering domain expertise, EHS compliance, and contractor management. The candidate's background is in FinTech/shipping PMO coordination with no construction, engineering, or technical facility management experience. Application is not recommended.
